reviews.review_description: I can't register, log in, receive verification by cell phone, by email, nothing. nothing works.

reviews.review_title: Wasting me 10mins For no textMsg Code
reviews.review_description: Only work in Korea, and cannot get text auth message on my phone outside of Korea, Fxxk, just wasting me 10mins.
Love the idea and visuals. Lag is really bad, no option to adjust qualitt

This app was amazing other than the horrible buffer times to watch a video even if you have fast internet speed. Please fix as this can be one of the coolest apps considering how amazing the content is. Please solve this!!

reviews.review_title: Really hard to get it to work
reviews.review_description: Unfortunately the videos are not smooth and take a long time to load.  Then today it just wouldn't let me log in...

Servers must only be located in korea because streaming is slowed to a crawl anywhere else, i'm talking maybe 1/2 seconds of video, followed by 20 seconds of buffering. it's a shame because the app content is very promising, but it is extremely frustrating to use at this point.

it didn’t let me to create an account, it’s says that my email and user are wrong, is there any other way to sign up? cause the app on app store isn’t available to me, and i look up in internet a way to create an account but it was unsuccessful, i was really excited to test the app :c
I liked the idea, but the videos take a long time to load. Even which I paid for and downloaded.

reviews.review_title: 신규 가입OR로그인하면, 중복계정 이라는 말만    나오고 가입불가 입다

reviews.review_description: So incredibly buggy. I can’t even sign up to use it. It keeps giving me problems in the sign up process. Wasn’t able to find any solutions online though I did find comments from users who have the same problem I do. Sent an email to customer support, but didn’t get a response. I give up. It’s way too aggravating.
